params.name: Golden Chan-hee
params.description: This pure golden statue of Chan-hee is crafted by an absolute master, striving to capture just a fraction of the beauty of our iconic hostess, Chan-hee! With eyes that shimmer and glance, bringing a radiant charm, the exquisite visage is lifelike, making it a legendary collectible. This costly statue can stand as a symbol of the strong bond between you and Chan-hee!
